scripts.build:cf: next build && opennextjs-cloudflare build --skipNextBuild && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const src='.open-next/assets';for(const f of fs.readdirSync(src))fs.renameSync(p.join(src,f),p.join('.open-next',f));fs.rmdirSync(src);fs.copyFileSync('.open-next/worker.js','.open-next/_worker.js');fs.writeFileSync('.open-next/_routes.json',JSON.stringify({version:1,include:['/*'],exclude:['/_next/static/*']}));"
